description.value: These soldiers have been extensively trained to hold their ground no matter what the situation. If any effect would force the special forces unit to move, reduce the distance by 10 feet. Any time they would be affected by the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Fleeing] condition, the special forces unit is instead @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Slowed]{Slowed 2} for the same duration.
